1
The Problem with Legacy ITSM
ServiceNow Was Built for IT Ticketing. Agentforce IT Service Was Built for the AI Era.

Agentforce IT Service is built for the way IT teams actually work — not bolted onto a legacy platform hoping something sticks. Orchestrated AI agents resolve incidents autonomously, using secure real-time data, so your team stops managing tickets and starts delivering outcomes. Unlike point solutions that drain budgets and stall implementations, Agentforce delivers fast time-to-value on the world's most trusted service platform.

Today — ServiceNow
Portal-first UX employees ignore or avoid
AI locked behind costly upgrade cycles (2–4×/yr)
Separate tools for IT, HR, CMDB, and field service
Every new device adds to your licensing bill
6–12 months to realize any value
With Agentforce IT Service
Slack & Teams-native — employees get help where they work
AI is built in — no upgrades required to unlock it
One platform: IT + HR + CRM + Field Service
Endpoints tracked in CMDB at no extra charge
Live in 30–60 days. Fully operational year one.

Core Capabilities
3
Platform Architecture
Built on the #1 Service Platform — Not Bolted On

Unlike ServiceNow, which requires separate integrations for non-IT functions, Agentforce IT Service sits natively on the Salesforce Platform — giving GE Vernova a single unified layer across every function, every team, and every AI agent.

⚡ Agentforce IT Service
↓
Agentforce Service  ·  HR Service  ·  Field Service  ·  CRM
↓
Agentforce  ·  AI Agents  ·  Einstein Trust Layer
↓
Data Cloud  ·  Real-Time Data  ·  Unified Asset Graph
↓
Salesforce Platform  ·  Security  ·  Compliance  ·  Continuous Updates
Every customer is on the same current release. Three upgrades per year are included at no cost, with no SI needed and no freeze windows — unlike ServiceNow, which requires 2–4 months of IT resources per upgrade cycle before any AI benefit is unlocked.

5
IT Team Experience
Amplify Your IT Team's Productivity with Agents

AI Agents for IT Teams

Your IT team gets AI Agents that work alongside them — intelligently triaging, routing, and resolving issues before a human needs to intervene. Agent Assist surfaces context, recommends next steps, and automates repetitive work.

Intelligent auto-assignment and triage
Incident, problem, and change management
IT Domain Pack and Connectors included
ITIL best practices built in — not bolted on

Unified CMDB with Real-Time Visibility

Unify your CMDB and Service Graph for a single view of every configuration item — infrastructure, apps, and services — with real-time connectivity data. Quickly detect, prevent, and predict service issues by prioritizing by business impact.

Service Graph shows ripple effects instantly
Discovery runs continuously — no manual audits
Laptops, phones, tablets tracked at no extra charge
